title: Homepage 'Whats inside' TOC: unify chapter taxonomy so titles and question counts agree
detail: site/index.html homepage list pairs EBOOK-editorial titles (chap.N.t, homepage-only) with QUESTION-BANK counts by id (chap.N.m1 -> SMT_CHAPTERS_META[id=N]) - two taxonomies indexed by same number, so labels/counts disagree and counts are blank on '/'. FIX: make title N and count N the same chapter. Source of truth = SMT_CHAPTERS_META (multilingual). Rewrite chap.1.t..chap.13.t in site/i18n-extras.js (12 langs) + site/index.html defaults to the question-bank titles; render counts on '/' via a small precomputed eager payload (NOT the 3.6MB site/questions.js). Update scripts/static-site-chapter-count-copy.test.js (line ~153 title assertion + the 'test 3' count-rendering block).
repro: site/index.html ol.list-quiet; site/app.js smtApplyChapterQuestionCounts; site/i18n-extras.js chap.N.t/m1; site/questions.js SMT_CHAPTERS_META; scripts/static-site-chapter-count-copy.test.js

title: Rebalance question bank: chapter 13 Traditions (145q) disproportionately dominates
detail: Each chapter is 1 UHR-sourced + 4 derived; ch13 Traditions has the most UHR base (29) so balloons to 145q - larger than governance/law/rights (716/895 are derived). DECIDE+IMPLEMENT: cap the derived multiplier per chapter (proportional) OR curate ch13 down; keep all UHR-sourced, trim derived tail. Regenerate site/questions.js + content/question-bank.csv via scripts/export-site-question-bank.js; expect to update many tests/content-* parity tests. Same 12-lang content surface as the tone-rewrite lane.
repro: content/question-bank.csv chapterId ch13 questionProvenance; data/chapters.ts ch13 questionCount=145; site/questions.js SMT_CHAPTERS_META id=13
